description_long: A male doctor stands upright with arms extended horizontally, wearing a long white medical coat that reaches to the knees. The coat is buttoned in the front and features a visible medical identification badge on the left chest. Underneath, he wears dark trousers and black shoes, presenting a professional and clean appearance. His hair is neatly styled, and his facial expression is neutral and attentive. The sleeves of the coat are long, and his hands are exposed, with no gloves or medical instruments visible. The overall attire and posture suggest readiness for clinical or public interaction in an urban environment.
description: A male doctor in a white coat with a visible badge, dark pants, and black shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doctor's face, white coat with badge, dark pants, and black shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the white coat, and the arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full length of the white coat, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, the white coat, and the extended arm.
